title: VeloraOS 1.6.3 — First-Run Wizard UX Hotfix
releaseNotes: Fixed the Device step so entering a valid system name enables Continue immediately.
Continue now securely saves an edited device name before moving to licensing.
Clarified that the fresh-install current administrator password is veloraos.
Kept accounts, chats, settings, avatars, licensing identity, setup state and Ollama models preserved.
